title: 10 Pack Large Aluminium Foil Trays Deep (3500ml) - Tin Foil Food Containers for Cooking, Baking, Roasting, and BBQ (32x26x7)
features: VERSATILE - Our large aluminium trays (32 x 26 x 7 cm) come in a handy pack of 10. These aluminum trays are perfect for preparing, baking, and serving meals, especially when you need deep containers for storing or transporting food.

DURABLE & MULTI PURPOSE - Made from premium aluminum, these aluminum trays are strong, sturdy and reliable. Whether you need aluminum baking trays for the oven, aluminum baking trays for the oven or even silver foil trays for party food, they are designed to do it all.

PERFECT FOR BBQING AND CATERING - These sturdy BBQ trays are perfect for outdoor grilling, roasting meats and cooking large meals. Use them as foil roasting trays for the oven or for baking during parties, holidays and events.

CONVENIENT AND DISPOSABLE - Designed with ease in mind, these disposable baking trays are both reusable and recyclable. You can wash them after use or simply throw them away, ideal for catering businesses or busy households.

SPACE SAVING & FREEZER SAFE - Our large aluminum trays are great for freezing leftovers or preparing ahead of time. These aluminum food containers nest easily for storage, keeping your kitchen organized while preserving your meals
description: ROVARIO Set of 10 large aluminum trays, the perfect solution for all your cooking and baking needs. These high quality aluminum trays are designed to make your cooking experience effortless and mess-free. With a large 3500ml capacity, these trays are perfect for roasting, baking and even barbecues. Made of durable aluminum, these aluminum trays are resistant to high heat and are suitable for use in the oven. They are perfect for cooking a variety of dishes, from juicy roasts to delicious baked treats. And with their convenient size of 32" x 26" x 7", these trays are perfect for any kitchen. But that's not all. These aluminum trays are also disposable, making cleaning a breeze. Just throw them into the trash can after use and enjoy more time with your loved ones. And for those who prefer to reduce waste, these trays are also easy to clean and reuse. The silver foil material of these trays not only adds a touch of elegance to your kitchen, but also ensures even heat distribution for perfectly cooked meals every time.
